name: LynxPoster
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'mkdir -p /home/vscode/.codex /home/vscode/.venvs && if [ -d "${containerWorkspaceFolder}/.codex-home" ] && [ -z "$(find /home/vscode/.codex -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 2>/dev/null)" ]; then cp -a "${containerWorkspaceFolder}/.codex-home"/. /home/vscode/.codex/; fi && if [ ! -x /home/vscode/.venvs/lynxposter/bin/python ]; then python -m venv /home/vscode/.venvs/lynxposter; fi && /home/vscode/.venvs/lynxposter/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && /home/vscode/.venvs/lynxposter/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt'
